title: Hercules and the Masked Rider
writer: Luciano Martino, Piero Pierotti, Ernesto Gastaldi
actors: Sergio Ciani, Mimmo Palmara, José Greci
plot: In 16th century Spain, Don Francisco reluctantly betroths his daughter, Blanca, to the arrogant Don Ramiro in order to preserve the lands in the family estate. Then Don Juan, Don Francisco's nephew and Blanca's true love, returns ...
